rule.descr: Docker images, Ansible repos, WebUI-Demo Git-Repos

alias.name: HOST_DNS_TRUSTED_REPOS
alias.content: deb.debian.org repo.zabbix.com download.proxmox.com enterprise.proxmox.com security.debian.org debian.map.fastlydns.net download.docker.com

alias.name: HOST_DNS_SPAMASSASSIN
alias.content: spamassassin.apache.org sa-update.dnswl.org sa-update.spamassassin.org sa-update.mailfud.org sa-update.fossies.org www.spamassassin.heinlein-support.de

alias.name: HOST_DNS_DockerHub
alias.content: registry-1.docker.io registry.hub.docker.com index.docker.io download.docker.com registry-origin.docker.io auth.docker.io docker.io production.cloudflare.docker.com

alias.name: HOST_DNS_GEOIP
alias.content: thyme.apnic.net peeringdb.com cdn.github.com raw.githubusercontent.com ipinfo.io dl.ipinfo.io
